changedFiles.reason: Reframed the entry page around calibrated human-agent trust while preserving the Repository Governance Layer boundary.
Aligned the Japanese entry page with the Mission, Philosophy, Mechanism, evidence, and product-boundary semantics.
Aligned the Chinese entry page with the Mission, Philosophy, Mechanism, evidence, and product-boundary semantics.
Established the authoritative mission, calibrated trust definition, evidence model, HCI framing, and Core boundary.
Explained how the existing governance flow serves calibrated trust and separated Core-owned records from delegated domain evidence.
Updated Core Positioning and the evolution/admission principles without adding a version or implementation promise.
Clarified README, Getting Started, Philosophy, Architecture, and Reference responsibilities.
Defined calibrated trust, evidence governance, native/delegated evidence, evidence-producing tools, release evidence, and the current product boundary.
Recorded the approved v2 scope, intent, acceptance, evidence sources, risks, and verification contract.
Recorded the implementation and verification handoff for this Work Item.
Regenerated Cockpit Status from the current Contract and Summary.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Mission, philosophy, mechanism, and implementation are consistently distinguished across authoritative documentation.
scenarioCoverage.reason: The final documentation presents Mission, Philosophy, Mechanism, and Implementation in a consistent hierarchy.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: English, Japanese, and Chinese README entry pages preserve equivalent positioning semantics.
evidence: Final README ordering assertions passed for README.md, README.ja.md, and README.zh-CN.md
Side-by-side review of the three README entry pages
scenarioCoverage.reason: The three entry pages now share the same problem → Mission → Calibrated Trust → product boundary → non-goals → philosophy/mechanism → evidence boundary → demo order.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Native governance evidence and delegated domain evidence remain clearly separated without changing runtime behavior.
scenarioCoverage.reason: Native Governance Evidence and Delegated Domain Evidence remain distinct, with no schema or runtime changes.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Release evidence is not presented as a Core tool implementation, while project-owned release maintenance remains accurately described.
scenarioCoverage.reason: SBOM is treated as an evidence artifact, CycloneDX as a standard/format, and named tools as external implementations.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: No code, test, CI, Makefile, schema, guard, installer, or release-flow file is modified.
scenarioCoverage.reason: Only Contract-declared documentation, governance records, and generated Status paths are changed.

guidelinesCompliance.guideline: Keep terminology language-neutral, project-neutral, and consistent across authoritative documents.
guidelinesCompliance.evidence: Updated the three README languages and authoritative philosophy, architecture, roadmap, documentation-architecture, and glossary pages with aligned terms.

guidelinesCompliance.guideline: Distinguish Mission, Philosophy, Mechanism, and Implementation.
guidelinesCompliance.evidence: Mission, Philosophy, Mechanism, and Implementation are explicit in README, design philosophy, architecture, roadmap, and glossary.

guidelinesCompliance.guideline: Do not overclaim current HCI scope or existing runtime capabilities.
guidelinesCompliance.evidence: Design philosophy limits the scope to human-agent collaboration in software repositories and states that AI Cockpit is not a general HCI Framework.

guidelinesCompliance.guideline: Prefer replacing or consolidating duplicate README content over appending new sections.
guidelinesCompliance.evidence: The positioning was integrated into the existing README opening sections and no new Vision document was created.

guidelinesCompliance.guideline: Preserve existing architecture and lifecycle semantics.
guidelinesCompliance.evidence: The existing Intent → Contract → Implementation → Verification → Summary → Cockpit → Human Decision flow and component tree were preserved.

guidelinesCompliance.guideline: Record no personal paths, credentials, or machine-specific configuration.
guidelinesCompliance.evidence: Only repository-relative paths appear in Contract and Summary records.
